title: ToolResult
description: Result returned from the Local Tool Runtime (or Backend Tool Service) after tool execution.

toolName.description: Name of the tool that was executed.

status.description: Execution outcome. 'denied' when policy blocks the tool call.

outputText.description: Truncated text output from the tool. May be empty if output was uploaded as an artifact.

artifactUris.description: URIs referencing full output uploaded to Workspace Service (for outputs > 10KB).

error.description: Error details when status is 'failed' or 'denied'.
